name: orderscout
description: Find and compare anything deliverable through Just Eat, Glovo, and Uber Eats in Spain, then prepare or safely place the selected order.

interface.longDescription: Search enabled Just Eat, Glovo, and Uber Eats accounts for restaurant meals, groceries, pharmacy products, convenience items, and other available products; compare totals, memberships, ETA, ratings, and quantity; then prepare or safely place the selected order.
defaultPrompt: Find the best-rated healthy dinner under €25 across my delivery apps. Do not order.
Find the cheapest delivered groceries on my list across Just Eat, Glovo, and Uber Eats.
Find a pharmacy or convenience store that can deliver the product I need fastest.
I only use Just Eat and Uber Eats, and I have Uber One. Save that preference.
Prepare the best option in my basket, but stop before ordering.
